findings.one_line: The variance bound is proved only by invoking `ass:clipped-propensity-variance-stability`, but that load-bearing assumption is not a declared core assumption or dependency, so this node silently imports an extra hypothesis.

The feasible-rate derivation rests on the undeclared variance-stability step, so the advertised upper exponent is conditional on an unstated extra assumption rather than proved from the hypotheses visible in this node.
The statement still claims equality at `gamma = 0`, but the proof only establishes equality under the extra side condition `c >= A_alpha`; otherwise only the lower/upper bracket is discharged.
